titleStmt.title: SII 22.434: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 434. (A.R. No. 434 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, SRIVAIKUNTHAM TALUK, MURAPPANĀḌU. VĒDANĀRĀYAṆA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH-WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE TRIBH. KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ—11th YEAR AND 493rd DAY

summary.p: This records a royal order issued at the request of Maḻavarāyaṉ and addressed to the authorities of the temple of Sōmidēva-viṇṇagar-āḻvār newly constructed on the banks of the Taṇporundam (Tāmraparṇi) river by Araiyaṉ Pūvaṉ Vēṇāḍuḍaiyār of Kīḻai-Koḍumaḷūr alias Madurōdaiyanallūr, making over certain lands at the place as tax-free dēvadāna, after acquiring them from their previous owners to meet the requirements of offerings and worship in the temple. This seems to have some connection with No. 433 above

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
2 svastiśrīḥ tribhuvanacakravartti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ vaṭatalaic cempināṭṭuk kiḻaikkoṭumaḷūrāṉa maturotayanallūr Araiyaṉ pūvaṉāṉa veṇāṭuṭai yār murappunāṭṭu comi
tevaccaturvedimaṅkalattu vaṭakiḻpāl taṇporunta vāṟṟaṅkaraiyi leḻun taruḷuvitta comideva viṇṇakarāḻvār koyil nampuceyvāṉukkum śrīvaiṣṇavar kaḷukkum Ivvā
ḻvārkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭa nitta nivantaṅkaḷukku Iccomitevac caturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār tevaṇṇaṉukkup potuvil nikkiṉa paṅkoṉṟum Ūrkkaṇakkaṉukku nikkiṉa pa
ṅkoṉṟum Ivvūr yogiśvaramuṭaiyārkku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy vaḻuvū ruṭaiyāṉ Āli villavataraiyaṉ kāṇiyāyivvūruṭaṉ kūṭṭiṉa nilam mukkāle Oru māvukku pratikṣetramākavum
comiteva viṇṇakarāḻvārkku Ivvūr sabhaiyār kārāṇmai tāṉa mākak kuṭutta cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nila morumāvukkumāka viṭṭa paṅkiraṇṭum cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nila muṉṟu
māvum Ākap paṅku nālāl vanta nilamum cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nila maraimāvum muṉṉuṭaiyārum mutalun tavirttu kārāṇmai miyāṭciyuṅ kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum
viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavarācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcu piliyuñ cantivikkirakappeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavumuṭpaṭap
patiṉoṉṟāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭu kārmutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvāḻvārkkut tiruppaṭimāṟ
ṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Iccomitevac caturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār tevaṇṇaṉukku potuvil nīkkiṉa paṅkoṉṟum Ūrkkaṇakkaṉukkuk kuṭutta paṅkoṉ
ṟu mivvūr yogiśvaramuṭaiyārkkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy vaḻuvūruṭai yāṉ Āli villavataraiyaṉ kāṇiyā yivvūruṭaṉ kūṭṭiṉa ciṟukaṭṭi nila mukkāle Orumāvukku pratikṣe
tramākavum Ic comiteva viṇṇakarāḻvārkku Ivvūr sabhaiyār kārāṇmai dāṉamākak kuṭutta cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nila morumāvukkum Āka viṭṭa paṅku Iraṇṭum cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ
kolāl nila maraimāvum Ākap paṅku nāliṉāl vanta nilamum cuntara pāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nila maraimāvum muṉṉuṭaiyārum mutalun tavirttu kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum kaṭamai Antarāyamu
m viniyokamun taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeyarpaṭṭaṉavu muṭpaṭa Ivvāṇṭumutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyi
liyāka Iṭṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam keḻviyun tarac coṉ ṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi candrādityavaṟ celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi vittukkoḷka Ivai Arum
porkūṟṟattu putupperkuḷattāḻvā ṉāṇpirāṉaḻakaṉāṉa Aḻakiya pāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 1vatu nāḷ 4 100 9 10 3 ṉāl Aṇṭanāṭṭup perumaṇalūr Araiyaṉ muṭivaḻaṅkum (ā few letters lost At the End)
Digital edition of SII 22.434 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
